{{CargoClone
|name=Bogenian
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=143
|gene1={race} RUSH +50
|gene2={race} TECH +50
|gene3=Per 10% HP lost, {race} RUSH +60
|gene4=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +6
|gene5=Refine +1 Blue Rebel Material +1.5%
|gene6=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +10
|gene7=Refine +1 Blue Rebel Material +2.5%
|}}
